content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Hardened milestone bead export explicit-id reuse in `src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs` by preferring milestone-qualified lookup candidates, accepting explicit matches only when they resolve to the current milestone or the current proposal identity, and consuming explicitly reused beads out of the title-based reuse cache so a second same-title proposal cannot collapse onto the same existing bead. Added focused regressions for milestone-scoped short explicit IDs, explicit-reuse cache consumption, and updated explicit-id expectations so the exporter suite remains green.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Inspect the explicit-id reuse path and title-based reuse cache in `src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs` to confirm both pending findings and identify the narrowest additive fix.
2. [Completed] Patch explicit bead lookup so milestone-qualified candidates are tried first, reuse is validated against the current milestone/proposal identity, and explicitly reused beads are removed from the same-title cache immediately.
3. [Completed] Add focused regression coverage for milestone-scoped short explicit IDs and for preventing a second same-title proposal from reusing the same explicit legacy bead within one export run.
4. [Completed] Run focused verification for the exporter changes with formatter, targeted regression tests, the full `materialize_beads_` test slice, and clippy.

## Validation Evidence

- `cargo fmt --all` completed successfully.
- `cargo test materialize_beads_prefers_milestone_scoped_explicit_short_ids -- --nocapture` passed.
- `cargo test materialize_beads_consumes_explicit_reuse_from_title_cache -- --nocapture` passed.
- `cargo test materialize_beads_reuses_same_title_explicit_proposals_by_proposal_label -- --nocapture` passed after adjusting explicit-match validation to honor proposal identity labels.
- `cargo test materialize_beads_reuses_duplicate_workstream_names_by_workstream_label -- --nocapture` passed after the explicit-match fix.
- `cargo test materialize_beads_ -- --nocapture` passed.
- `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` passed.
- `cargo fmt --check` passed.

## Outstanding Risks

- I did not rerun full `cargo test` or `nix build` after this amendment; repository-wide verification is still outstanding on the final tree.
- Prior rounds showed an unrelated repo-wide blocker in `cli::run::tests::resume_running_failed_project_reenters_failure_reconciliation` with a controller-journal timestamp regression, and that may still be the reason full `cargo test`/`nix build` remain red.
- The stricter short-id explicit reuse path now requires either the canonical milestone-qualified ID or milestone/proposal labels when `br show` resolves to a short actual ID, so legacy unlabeled short-id beads may no longer be auto-reused until they are milestone-scoped or re-exported.
